data.title: Norwood Financial Corp reports 2025 results w/ EPS of $3.01, net interest margin ↑58 bps, loan growth 8.2%, & deposit growth 11.8%. Tangible book value/share ↑15.4%. Total assets $2.425B, loans $1.853B, deposits $2.079B. Non-GAAP measures reported.
data.description: Norwood Financial Corp and its subsidiary, Wayne Bank, reported positive financial results for the full year ended December 31, 2025. Highlights include a fully diluted EPS of $3.01, net interest margin increased by 58 basis points, loan growth of 8.2%, deposit growth of 11.8%, and tangible book value per share increased by 15.4%. The company's net interest income reached $78.3 million, with a net income of $27.9 million. Norwood Financial Corp acquired Presence Bank on January 5, 2026, expanding its geographic presence, assets, and team. Total assets for Norwood Financial Corp were at $2.425 billion, with loans receivable at $1.853 billion and total deposits at $2.079 billion. The company's stock trades on the Nasdaq Global Market under the symbol "NWFL." The financial results show the company's strong growth and profitability, positioning them for a promising future.

data.title: SLB to report Q4 earnings of 74 cents per share on Jan. 23, revenue estimate $9.55B. Dividend yield at 2.35%.
data.description: SLB N.V. (NYSE: SLB) is set to announce its fourth-quarter earnings on Friday, Jan. 23, before the market opens. Analysts predict earnings of 74 cents per share for this quarter, a decrease from 92 cents per share reported in the same period last year. The consensus estimate for SLB's Q4 revenue stands at $9.55 billion, up from $9.28 billion a year ago. Stifel analyst Stephen Gengaro reiterated a Buy rating for SLB and increased the price target from $48 to $52 on Wednesday. The recent uptrend in SLB has caught the attention of investors, with the company offering an annual dividend yield of 2.35%, equivalent to a quarterly dividend of 28.5 cents per share ($1.14 annually). For more information, the full article can be found on Benzinga.com.
Fox Business interview with Trump ends.

data.title: Willis Lease Finance Corporation appoints Steven Bridgland as Head of Investor Relations & Capital Markets for Willis Aviation Capital, managing investor relationships.
data.description: In Coconut Creek, Florida, on January 22, 2026, Willis Lease Finance Corporation (NASDAQ: WLFC), a prominent commercial aircraft engine lessor and aviation services provider, named Steven Bridgland as the Head of Investor Relations & Capital Markets for its new asset manager, Willis Aviation Capital. Bridgland will oversee managing current investor connections, cultivating new investor partnerships, and assisting in capital allocation activities for Willis Aviation Capital.

data.title: RSA Group secures $135 million for AI product innovation and growth, refining debt structure.
data.description: A cybersecurity company, RSA Group, which includes RSA and Outseer, completed a refinancing deal for its existing first and second lien term loans, with the participation of a significant majority of holders. Remaining lenders holding first and second lien loans have the option to join the transaction. The refinancing involved a substantial capital injection.

data.title: Exhibitus launches EXstudios, led by Richard Sears, to expand experiential work. ATLANTA, Jan. 22, 2026.
data.description: Renowned creative professional Richard Sears has been appointed to lead Exhibitus' newly established division, EXstudios, in Atlanta. This dedicated experiential strategy and creative ideation studio marks a significant expansion of the company's work in this field. The announcement was made on January 22, 2026. This move reflects the industry's increasing focus on immersive experiences and innovation.

data.title: Crypto investment firm Pantera Capital forecasts major consolidation in corporate crypto holdings in 2026, as few big players will dominate. Smaller companies expected to be acquired.
data.description: Pantera Capital anticipates a period of notable consolidation in corporate crypto treasuries in the upcoming year. The forecast suggests that a select number of major entities will control the demand for digital assets, while smaller firms are likely to be acquired.

data.title: PSQ Impact selected by Donald J. Trump Presidential Library for digital fundraising platform, NYSE: PSQH, to achieve goals.
data.description: PSQ Holdings, Inc. publicized that their advanced fundraising platform, PSQ Impact, was chosen by the Donald J. Trump Presidential Library for digital fundraising support. This collaboration with the Trump Presidential Library, announced today, is aimed at broadening the library's donor network and reaching ambitious fundraising targets. PSQ Holdings, Inc. is listed on NYSE as PSQH. The platform will assist the library in enhancing its online fundraising capabilities for its operations.

data.title: Northpointe Bank partners with Tavant to use TOUCHLESS® AI Mortgage Platform for faster transactions and enhanced borrower experience.
data.description: In Santa Clara, California, a prominent AI-powered fintech solutions and digital engineering provider, Tavant, revealed that Northpointe Bank, a distinguished financial institution known for inventive lending solutions, has opted for Tavant’s TOUCHLESS® AI Mortgage Transformation Platform. This move aims to facilitate the digital overhaul of its processes and enhance efficiency. Through this platform, Northpointe Bank anticipates expediting transactions, simplifying borrower experiences, and optimizing the loan origination journey.
